subject: [PATCH 06/11] mm/zsmalloc, zswap: Redirect zswap_entry->objcg to zspage

2026-03-11.patch_summary: This patch redirects the zswap layer to use the obj_cgroup pointer stored in the zspage, eliminating duplicate storage and resulting in a net zero memory footprint change. The lifetime and charging of the obj_cgroup is still handled in the zswap layer. Additionally, the patch cleans up the mem_cgroup_from_entry function as it has no remaining callers.
